items.example: Have you ever tried bungee jumping?

items.phrase: Yes, I have. It was amazing!
items.example: A: Have you ever been to a live concert? B: Yes, I have. It was amazing!

items.phrase: No, I've never… but I'd love to
items.translation: Нет, никогда… но я бы хотел
items.example: No, I've never been abroad, but I'd love to go.
I've never tried Korean food, but it looks delicious.

items.phrase: It was one of the best experiences of my life
items.translation: Это был один из лучших опытов в моей жизни
items.example: I went scuba diving last year. It was one of the best experiences of my life.
A: I tried skydiving last weekend. B: What was it like?
You've been to Iceland? It sounds fascinating!
